name: Suspicious HWP Sub Processes Detected
description: Detects suspicious sub-processes of the Hangul Word Processor (Hwp.exe), which could indicate exploitation. Adversaries may use malicious HWP documents to execute code, a common technique for initial access and execution.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **{image}**, was launched by the Hangul Word Processor (**{parent_image}**). This is a strong indicator of a potential **Exploitation** attempt against the HWP application, which is a common **Initial Access** vector (**MITRE ATT&CK T1566.001**). Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the suspicious child process.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, which is expected to be 'Hwp.exe'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
